clientId.title: Smartcar Client ID
clientId.description: Your Smartcar V3 Client ID (starts with client_01…). Find it at dashboard.smartcar.com → API credentials.

managementToken.title: Application Management Token
managementToken.description: Find it at dashboard.smartcar.com → your app → Application Configuration → Application Management Token. Used to automatically resolve your userId.

userId.title: Smartcar User ID (optional override)
userId.description: Leave empty – the userId is resolved automatically via the Management Token. Only set this if you want to override.

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often to refresh vehicle data (minimum 30 s).

notifyWebhookUrl.title: Notification Webhook URL (optional)
notifyWebhookUrl.description: Optional: POST webhook called when vehicle state changes.
